notes: Fixed biometric unlock never completing: the app was calling the biometric plugin through a method name that only exists in a code layer this app doesn't ship, so the fingerprint/face prompt could pass on the device yet the app never heard back. It now talks to the plugin's real native method (with the old name kept as a fallback), so enabling biometrics in Settings > Security and unlocking with them works.

The Biometric Unlock row in Settings > Security now shows a small status line underneath — which biometric plugin the app can see, or that none is in this build — so it's obvious whether an app update is still needed.
